description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with highly distorted and elongated limbs and body, resulting in an unnatural and stretched appearance. The head is human-like and proportionate, but the arms and legs are extended far beyond normal human anatomy, with the arms in particular appearing extremely thin and reaching out horizontally. The torso and lower body are similarly stretched, with the clothing following the elongated form, creating a surreal, almost ribbon-like effect. The figure appears to be wearing a long garment that drapes down, and the feet are visible at the ends of the extended legs. The overall form is highly abstracted, with the human features only clearly visible in the head and hands.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian with extremely elongated limbs and body, wearing a long garment and featuring a proportionate human head.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the arms and garment stretching outward and downward in a dramatic, elongated fashion.
description_view_1: Side view showing the extreme length of the arm and the thinness of the limb, with the head in profile and the garment trailing behind.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stretched back and the way the garment and limbs extend outward, with the head facing away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the head in profile, showing the other arm's extreme length and the continued distortion of the body and garment.
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and elongated, arms extended horizontally
